name: edloidas-workflow
description: A Codex-safe workflow bundle for instruction-file sync, commit summaries, label management, issue analysis, and Git worktree management.

interface.shortDescription: Instruction sync, commit summaries, labels, issues, and worktrees.
interface.longDescription: Install lightweight Git and GitHub workflow helpers from edloidas/skills for syncing repo instruction files, summarizing commits, managing labels, planning issues, and working across multiple worktrees.
